Name: Asvalee Nilvet (Ark)

Title: Student Council President, Fire Hall (Ignis), 4th Year

Element & Magic: Fire and Light — rare fusion of destructive and purifying magic; wields holy sword Arunanth; bonded with phoenix familiar Seraph.

Appearance: 197 cm, 70 kg, pale skin, black hair with red tips, golden eyes.

Personality: Calm, authoritative, values truth and justice; speaks rarely but with impact.

Background: Heir of Nilvet family, guardian of sacred flame; entered Naphalai at 15 and quickly rose to Student Council President.
